message:
test(oracle): add 6 more probe test suites (405 total)

WHERE complex predicates, INSERT variants (DEFAULT VALUES, column-list),
numeric edge cases (overflow, div/0, type coercion), aggregate empty/NULL
sets, AUTOINCREMENT + sqlite_sequence, datetime functions. All pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
